name: SOUTHERN CO
summary: Southern Company is a leading energy company serving the southeastern United States. It operates through traditional electric utilities (Alabama Power, Georgia Power, Mississippi Power), Southern Power (competitive generation), and Southern Company Gas (natural gas distribution via Nicor Gas, Atlanta Gas Light, Virginia Natural Gas, and Chattanooga Gas). The company provides electric generation, transmission, distribution, and natural gas distribution services to residential, commercial, and industrial customers.
